item.title: Forging a Dutch Oven Lid Lifter
item.description: A calm look at forging a practical Dutch oven lid lifter, with focus on shaping, fit, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Dutch Oven Lid Lifter
media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging a practical Dutch oven lid lifter, with focus on shaping, fit, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

item.title: Wooden Handle, Not Just a Hammer
item.description: A simple look at why a wooden handle doesn’t always mean a hammer, with a focus on shop tools and practical blacksmithing details.

media:content.media:title: Wooden Handle, Not Just a Hammer
media:content.media:description: A simple look at why a wooden handle doesn’t always mean a hammer, with a focus on shop tools and practical blacksmithing details.

item.title: Forging a Simple Cowbell
item.description: A calm look at forging a simple cowbell, with focus on shaping hot metal and traditional shop technique.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Simple Cowbell
media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging a simple cowbell, with focus on shaping hot metal and traditional shop technique.

item.title: Blacksmithing 101: Forging Hardy Tools
item.description: A calm look at forging hardy tools in the blacksmith shop, with focus on heat, shaping, and traditional metalworking technique.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing 101: Forging Hardy Tools
media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging hardy tools in the blacksmith shop, with focus on heat, shaping, and traditional metalworking technique.

item.title: Is This Material Wrought Iron?
item.description: A close look at identifying wrought iron in the forge, with a focus on material recognition and traditional metalworking skill.

media:content.media:title: Is This Material Wrought Iron?
media:content.media:description: A close look at identifying wrought iron in the forge, with a focus on material recognition and traditional metalworking skill.

item.title: Cold Weather Tips for the Workshop
item.description: A practical look at handling cold weather in the workshop, with a focus on comfort, workflow, and steady shop habits.

media:content.media:title: Cold Weather Tips for the Workshop
media:content.media:description: A practical look at handling cold weather in the workshop, with a focus on comfort, workflow, and steady shop habits.

item.title: Forging an Improved Railroad Spike Axe
item.description: A blacksmith shapes and refines a railroad spike into an upgraded axe using traditional forging, grinding, and heat-treating techniques.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Improved Railroad Spike Axe
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith shapes and refines a railroad spike into an upgraded axe using traditional forging, grinding, and heat-treating techniques.

item.title: Building a Custom Propane Forge
item.description: A blacksmith builds a propane forge from raw materials, assembling the burner system and forge body for efficient metalworking and heat control.

media:content.media:title: Building a Custom Propane Forge
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith builds a propane forge from raw materials, assembling the burner system and forge body for efficient metalworking and heat control.

item.title: Forging a Handmade Corkscrew
item.description: A blacksmith forges a functional corkscrew by heating, twisting, and shaping steel using traditional metalworking techniques.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Handmade Corkscrew
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith forges a functional corkscrew by heating, twisting, and shaping steel using traditional metalworking techniques.

item.title: Getting Started With Simple Forging
item.description: A beginner-friendly forging project demonstrates basic blacksmithing techniques, tool handling, and simple metal shaping methods.

media:content.media:title: Getting Started With Simple Forging
media:content.media:description: A beginner-friendly forging project demonstrates basic blacksmithing techniques, tool handling, and simple metal shaping methods.
